prompt:
A pocket-sized digital pH meter placed on a clean bench beside two small calibration solution cups, one slightly tinted and one clear, with the meter’s probe cap removed and resting nearby. The meter display is on but shows only blurred, unreadable numerals, emphasizing accurate pH measurement and calibration readiness without any readable branding or text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk lab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean reflections, no logos, no readable screen text, and minimal clutter. Center the meter so it reads immediately as an inventory icon.
